rationale: Defining property is 'a non-logical symbol of arity n >= 1', so def:arity is load-bearing and was missing. Added (same fix as 0063/0065).
notes: def:function-symbol kept but flagged: predicate and function symbols are siblings (non-logical symbols, one relational one functional), not one depending on the other -- the same symbol-introduction chaining seen at 0063/0065. 'forms atomic formulas P(t_1,...,t_n)' must NOT be turned into a def:atomic-formula edge: that would be backward/cyclic, since def:atomic-formula (0062) depends on def:predicate-symbol.
